merged_prs.title: Add central `synchronize` configuration parameter to Alpaka modules
Run3-gem82 Change in GE21 setup in view of last minute changes
ParameterSet/Config.py: Use realpath of  cmssw area to avoid symlink issue
Reduce memory held between Events in PFProducer
[Geometry] Use std::abs to fix clang compilation warnings
clean-up unused inclusions in HLT paths in Phase2 HLT menu
Improvements to the LST workflows and small general LST fixes
[NGT] Implement new seeding module for HLT Standalone Muon seeding and streamline HLT L3 Tracker Muon reconstruction
Add Et distributions for BC & SC energy ECAL DQM plots
Handle case where modules share memory in ModuleEventAllocMonitor
Decrease temporary memory held by PuppiProducer
MTD Validation: add efficiency plots for correct reco match
MTD simulation: update hit classification, extend it to ETL, add last stored ancestor information to TrackInformation
[DQM] Replace fabs with std::abs to fix clang warnings
Change ElectronID to the latest in python configuration for JetPlusTrack algoritm
[Visualization] Replace fabs with std::abs to fix clang compilation warnings
Add {Copy,Move}ToDeviceCache<T> class templates and moveToDeviceAsync function template
Addition of RelVal to HLT HG Combined PCL workflow
ECAL - Make EcalUncalibRecHitSoAToLegacy a global module
Added CMSSW_FULL_RELEASE_BASE in to valid cmssw import paths
disable -Ofast for MkFitCore/src/IterationConfig.cc due to json.hpp use of IEEE infinities
Fix DQM config test: Increase number of sequences to process
Update MC GTs for Winter25 and 2024 HI/ppRef in autoCond - CMSSW_150X
Clear memory at end of event in DeepFlavourONNXJetTagsProducer
Extend `SimpleMemoryCheck` service to report jemalloc and smaps information, and on early termination signal
